ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  "security_question" TEXT /* Security question for password recovery */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action type */,
  "sensitive" INTEGER /* Whether the action type is sensitive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action performed by the user */,
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action type */,
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purpose */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the action */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was created */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last changed the action */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was last changed */,
  "changed_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the last change made to the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("purpose_id") REFERENCES action_purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_action_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_type_id") REFERENCES action_types ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action type */,
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purpose */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Details of the action log */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("purpose_id") REFERENCES action_purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_action_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_type_id") REFERENCES action_types ("action_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES user_actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the account was last updated */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account change */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account being changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_changes_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the suspicious activity */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being monitored */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_details" TEXT /* Details of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is resolved */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_alerts_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES user_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_details" TEXT /* Details of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "audit_trail_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit trail */,
  "audit_trail_details" TEXT /* Details of the audit trail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES user_actions ("action_id")
)
